audit_items.proof_trace: All P2P-sourced trie data is validated before state insertion. Two P2P entry points exist (BlockDownloader.cs:214, SyncServer.cs:197), both call ValidateSuggestedBlock before block processing. Blocks are enqueued with ProcessingOptions.None (never NoValidation). ValidateProcessedBlock verifies state root consistency before StateProvider.FlushToTree commits to trie.
